name: rw-research-skill
description: 研究问题、文献、证据、创新点、设计、写作和投稿工作流。

interface.shortDescription: Route and carry out research workflows.
interface.longDescription: RW Research Skill provides thirteen standalone workflows for research questions, literature discovery, paper extraction, evidence mapping, candidate research novelty, review methods, research design, review, academic writing, author tone, journal submission, and tool selection.
interface.defaultPrompt: Use $rw-research-router to identify the current research bottleneck and route this request to one research skill.
